antipattern.description: All routing content inside CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md missing.
antipattern.reason: Auto-loader path breaks; Claude Code skill resolution drifts.

antipattern.description: AGENTS.md grown to 300+ lines with full architecture inside.
antipattern.reason: Context tax compounds across sessions; signal density drops.

antipattern.description: AGENTS.md has prose only, no file table.
antipattern.reason: Agents grep-walk the dir; tasks that should take 30 seconds take 5 minutes.

antipattern.description: AGENTS.md at repo root only; subpackages have none.
antipattern.reason: Agents enter a subdir and lose context. Inconsistent behaviour.

antipattern.description: AGENTS.md mentions files that no longer exist; INDEX.md stale.
antipattern.reason: Trust erodes; reviewers stop reading the doc.
